display.name: health.status
display.description: Health status of an application

display.name: namespace
display.description: Kubernetes Namespace

display.name: repo
display.description: Git Repository Name

display.name: sync.status
display.description: Sync status of an application

display.name: Applications By Repository
display.description: Shows applications count by repository over the time

filter.expression: namespace = $namespace AND repo = $repo AND health_status in $health.status AND sync_status in $sync.status

display.name: Age of Cluster Cache
display.description: Cluster cache age in seconds.

display.name: Number Of Applications
display.description: Number of applications present in the ArgoCD Dashboard

filter.expression: namespace = $namespace AND repo = $repo AND health_status in $health.status AND sync_status in $sync.status

display.name: Count of Application Reconciliation by Duration Bounds
display.description: Shows the count of application reconciliation by Duration Bounds

display.name: Application Health Distribution
display.description: Distribution of application health statuses across all apps

display.name: Suspended
display.description: Number of application which are suspended

display.name: Sync Status Distribution
display.description: Distribution of application sync statuses across all apps

display.name: Degraded
display.description: Number of application which are degraded

display.name: Git Requests by Type
display.description: Rate of git requests performed by the repo server, broken down by request type

display.name: Synced
display.description: Shows the number of the synced application in the ArgoCD Dashboard

display.name: OutOfSync
display.description: Number of applications which are out of sync

display.name: K8s API Activity
display.description: Shows the number of Kubernetes requests executed during application reconciliation

display.name: Count of Cluster Resource Objects
display.description: The number of kubernetes resource objects in the cache

display.name: Repository Servers
display.description: Number for Repository present in the ArgoCD Dashboard

display.name: Count of Cluster Events
display.description: The number of processed kubernetes events

display.name: Reconciliation Performance
display.description: Shows application reconciliation performance

display.name: Progressing
display.description: Number of applications that are currently in progress

display.name: Healthy
display.description: Number of healthly applications in ArgoCD Dashboard

display.name: Git Request Duration (P99)
display.description: 99th percentile of git request duration by repository

display.name: Sync activity
display.description: Show different phases of sync activity

display.name: Orphaned Resources per App
display.description: Number of orphaned resources per application

display.name: Pending Repo Requests
display.description: Number of pending requests requiring repository lock

display.name: Count of API Resources
display.description: The number of monitored kubernetes API resources

display.name: Workqueue Depth
display.description: Current depth of workqueue

display.name: Cluster Connection Status
display.description: Current connection status to each registered cluster (1=connected, 0=not connected)

display.name: Reconciliation activity
display.description: Shows Application reconciliation count over the time
